title: salix sanguinea
intro: Salix sanguinea, also known as the red-stemmed willow or crimson willow, is a shrub or small tree native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, infections, and pain. The health benefits of Salix sanguinea include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. Salix sanguinea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herb for herbal remedies.
